name: Kimberly Padilla
subject: Your $26 = $104
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | I'll just be blunt Peter. We need to raise $26,000 by tomorrow night. **If we don't hit $26,000, we won't reach our FEC goal, and we will have to take down our TV ads.** That would be very bad... Peter. [**Depending on what you give, your contribution will be double, triple, or even QUADRUPLE-matched.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe1d/4462dc26/7a9dc5c1/201aa4fc/3682841336/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180925pm?refcode=sbe180925pm_m") [**$5 contributions -> _doubled to $10_**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe1d/4462dc26/7a9dc5c1/201aa4f3/3682841336/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180925pm?refcode=sbe180925pm_m&amount=5") [**$10 contributions -> _tripled to $30_**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe1d/4462dc26/7a9dc5c1/201aa4f2/3682841336/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180925pm?refcode=sbe180925pm_m&amount=10") [**Match our average online contribution of $26 -> _QUADRUPLED to $104_**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe1d/4462dc26/7a9dc5c1/201aa4f1/3682841336/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180925pm?refcode=sbe180925pm_m&amount=26") Pulling down TV and digital ads now would be a nightmare. Polling is the closest we've seen yet. Trump, Pence, Renacci, and the special interests are all teaming up to defeat Sherrod. **We are Sherrod's best defense.** He fights like hell for us in the Senate. The least we can do is make sure he has the resources to keep his job. [**Take advantage of our match program while it's still open. Give $5, $10, or $26 now. >>**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe1d/4462dc26/7a9dc5c1/201aa4fc/3682841336/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180925pm?refcode=sbe180925pm_m") Thanks! Kimberly Kimberly Padilla
Finance Director
Friends of Sherrod Brown

subject: We can’t be silent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Judge Kavanaugh. |

Friend,

Judge Kavanaugh has become the victim of a televised witch hunt playing out in front of his own family.

Democrats only want to smear this man because he was nominated by President Trump.

We've heard from every liberal senator. _They 've even told us to "SHUT UP."_ Now it's time for these Senate obstructionists to hear from the American people.

**From NOW until Thursday morning at 9 AM, we need to send a NON-STOP flow of petitions signed by the American people to Senate Democrats to _STOP THE WITCH HUNT AGAINST JUDGE KAVANAUGH._**

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: Furious about Kavanaugh? Let's build a huge Blue Wave
body:
Activist - Republicans are racing full-speed to put a serial sexual assaulter - and serial liar - on the Supreme Court so they can take away all our rights and make us slaves to corporations and billionaires. **There is only one way to stop them. We need a huge Blue Wave** to wash Republicans out of power in the Senate, the House, and every state and local office. Early voting has already begun in some states so [**let 's ask every Democratic-leaning voter we know to take the Blue Wave pledge! **](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BokYv/6/pZ/r5cs/6fUWzQ/zvO1r8kHdv/P/P) We're using an app called [**VoteWithMe**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BokYv/s/pZ/r5cs/6fUWzQ/6gROE7GjRf/P/P)that makes it easy and fun to contact your friends using text, email, or social messaging. **1)[ Download the VoteWithMe app by clicking this link from your phone](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BokYv/v/pR/r5cs/6fUWzQ/vSlEHZ4FwV/P/P) .** **If you 're not reading this on your phone, open your phone's browser and carefully type: [https://votewithme.us/r/dems](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BokYv/z/pR/r5cs/6fUWzQ/vXCFRH0eC/P/P)** Then install the app. **2) Sync your contacts.**
******VoteWithMe was built by a progressive non-profit with a strict[privacy policy ](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BokYv/U/p1/r5cs/6fUWzQ/sOOLFogugN/P/P)that absolutely does not share or sell your data.** ********3) Filter your contacts.**** **You can prioritize voters in your own state, other key states like Florida and Ohio, and even the tightest House races in the nation (using the flame icon).** Then select your progressive friends by pressing the arrow to the right of their name. This loads a page with their legal name and voting state for your confirmation. (In the 28 states with party registration, you can also see their party.) Scroll down for a description of this year's key races in that state, important voting deadlines, and even your friend's public voting history (when**** they voted but never who they voted for). It's especially important to contact friends who only vote for President every 4 years, but skip the crucial Congressional elections like 2018. Be sure to focus on your progressive friends - don't contact Trump supporters! **4) Send a customizable message** **Use the button at the bottom to load a pre-written message:** **** **** Then pick the appropriate message. **You know your friends best, which is why every message is totally customizable.** You can edit the default message with the edit pencil in the upper right. When you're done, choose iMessage for texting or the round upload button for email, Facebook messenger, or any other app you use for messaging. ****

Let's channel our anger over Brett Kavanaugh into creating the biggest Blue Wave in history. [**Download VoteWithMe and start mobilizing your Democratic friends today!**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BokYv/j/pZ/r5cs/6fUWzQ/HwDDUZoyE/P/P) Bob Fertik, Sara Tabatabaie, and the BlueWaveVoters team
**PS -- Do you have thoughts on VoteWithMe? Tweet[ @BlueWaveVoters](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BokYv/5/tC/r5cs/6fUWzQ/zEZXPblwe/P/P) or [join our Facebook group](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BokYv/r/pf/r5cs/6fUWzQ/zpG45sU4dp/P/P) to tell us how it went! Our team is here to help with anything you need. **
---

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](https://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNDIyLzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMjQ3NDc3Mjgx)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: Max Harris
subject: Did you see the ad yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friends,

Checking back in, did you get a chance to watch our Washington Walorski ad yet?

It's been a busy week, and we've been getting great responses from people who are seeing it. Now we need your help to make sure voters across northern Indiana see it too.

**Contribute now to fund our latest ad buy and make sure voters hear about Rep. Walorski 's votes against affordable health care.**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/fjmUczfxuqwUs4etVHGg4iZuePNWTLMcWERAEENNuuM=/YiiEJfe4ha2Ig7qdKGM72G9Vd5BVqLmAlbMLlcN1H_o=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em180926)
[Express Donate $50 ](https://act.myngp.com/el/fjmUczfxuqwUs4etVHGg4iZuePNWTLMcWERAEENNuuM=/YiiEJfe4ha2Ig7qdKGM72G9Vd5BVqLmAlbMLlcN1H_o=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em180926)
[Express Donate $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/fjmUczfxuqwUs4etVHGg4iZuePNWTLMcWERAEENNuuM=/YiiEJfe4ha2Ig7qdKGM72G9Vd5BVqLmAlbMLlcN1H_o=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em180926)
[Express Donate $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/fjmUczfxuqwUs4etVHGg4iZuePNWTLMcWERAEENNuuM=/YiiEJfe4ha2Ig7qdKGM72G9Vd5BVqLmAlbMLlcN1H_o=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em180926)
[Donate Another Amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/fjmUczfxuqwUs4etVHGg4iZuePNWTLMcWERAEENNuuM=/YiiEJfe4ha2Ig7qdKGM72G9Vd5BVqLmAlbMLlcN1H_o=?express_lane=true&refcode=em180926)

Hoosiers need someone who's actually going to work for them. I know who Rep. Walorski is working for, and it certainly isn't us.

-Max

**\------Original message from Mel Hall for Congress------**

Friends,

There's no doubt about it: Rep. Walorski's gone Washington.

What do I mean by that? She voted 11 times to let insurance companies gut coverage for people with pre-existing conditions. That would put one in three Hoosiers at risk of being denied health care.

Some things are complicated, but this is not. Everyone needs to know about this, so we've cut a new ad, and we need your help to get the message out. See it here, then share it with your friends:

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/fjmUczfxuqwUs4etVHGg4iZuePNWTLMcWERAEENNuuM=/LA-GBBxPXMyQWkJImP9XjXZWBbl3CGilg2lXTbPrcTA=)
**[SHARE ON FACEBOOK](https://act.myngp.com/el/fjmUczfxuqwUs4etVHGg4iZuePNWTLMcWERAEENNuuM=/LA-GBBxPXMyQWkJImP9XjXZWBbl3CGilg2lXTbPrcTA=) | [SHARE ON TWITTER](https://act.myngp.com/el/fjmUczfxuqwUs4etVHGg4iZuePNWTLMcWERAEENNuuM=/tO2YvKBc-AMRVQIt7-j1FguNyUYVFokr8dI-2KzbdUg=)**

As a minister, Mel comforted the sick. And as the leader of a health care company, he focused on improving patient care.

In Congress, he'll be a tireless fighter for hard-working Hoosiers, and never get distracted by Washington perks or swept up in corporate lobbying. He's committed to the people of the 2nd district, and he will never forget where he came from.

[_**Mel will fight for us, but we have to fight for him first. Share this ad with your friends and make sure everyone learns about how out-of-touch Rep. Walorski has become.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/fjmUczfxuqwUs4etVHGg4iZuePNWTLMcWERAEENNuuM=/LA-GBBxPXMyQWkJImP9XjXZWBbl3CGilg2lXTbPrcTA=)

Thank you for all your hard work,

Max Harris
Campaign Manager, Mel Hall for Congress

Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
---

Mel Hall for Congress
P.O. Box 862
South Bend, IN 46624 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/fjmUczfxuqwUs4etVHGg4iZuePNWTLMcWERAEENNuuM=/GEh6s_XF3hTzWYs6qveEdkzve365JdKzfp5NJ0-yTVE=).

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: President Trump Addresses U.N. General Assembly: We Choose ‘Independence’ Over ‘Global Governance’
body:
| |
---
#
# **_President Trump Addresses U.N. General Assembly: We Choose ‘Independence’ Over ‘Global Governance’_**
#
“President Donald Trump spoke about globalism and national sovereignty in a speech before the United Nations General Assembly on Tuesday, telling the body that ‘America will always choose independence and cooperation over global governance, control and domination,’” Jeffrey Cimmino writes in _The Washington Free Beacon_. “I honor the right of every nation in this room to pursue its own customs, beliefs and traditions. The United States will not tell you how to live, work or worship. We only ask that you honor our sovereignty in return,” President Trump said. [**Click here to read more.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI2Ljk1Mzg0NjgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNi45NTM4NDY4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkwOTQzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://freebeacon.com/politics/trump-addresses-un-general-assembly-we-choose-independence-over-global-governance/) “U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations Nikki Haley charged Wednesday that former Secretary of State John Kerry's ongoing talks with Iran are ‘anti-American,’” as they undermine U.S. diplomacy, Pete Kasperowicz reports in the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI2Ljk1Mzg0NjgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNi45NTM4NDY4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkwOTQzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/nikki-haley-john-kerrys-secret-talks-with-iran-are-anti-american). “What Secretary Kerry did was not only disrespectful, it was hurtful to America,” Ambassador Haley said. “Consumer confidence rose in September, notching its highest level in about 18 years. The Consumer Board’s index rose to 138.4 this month from 134.7 in August,” Fred Imbert reports for [**CNBC**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI2Ljk1Mzg0NjgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNi45NTM4NDY4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkwOTQzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/cnbc-consumer-confidence-rises-highest-level-18-years/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr). “Consumers’ assessment of current conditions remains extremely favorable, bolstered by a strong economy and robust job growth,” said Lynn Franco, the Conference Board’s director of economic indicators. The [**_Investor’s Business Daily_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI2Ljk1Mzg0NjgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNi45NTM4NDY4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkwOTQzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.investors.com/politics/editorials/economic-boom-trump-global-economy/) editorial board points out that the U.S. economy is booming and pulling ahead from the rest of the world, according to CNBC’s Global CFO Council survey. “Remember when everybody said that the ‘unexpectedly’ strong economy under President Trump had nothing to do with his policies? He was just lucky because the global economy was booming, they said. Well, that attempt to dismiss the Trump boom just fell by the wayside.” “The United States imposed new sanctions on Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro’s wife and several of his top allies on Tuesday as U.S. President Donald Trump urged members of the United Nations to support a ‘restoration of democracy’ in the once-booming OPEC nation,” Lesley Wroughton and Brian Ellsworth report for [**_Reuters_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI2Ljk1Mzg0NjgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNi45NTM4NDY4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkwOTQzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.reuters.com/article/us-usa-venezuela/u-s-targets-venezuelan-presidents-wife-others-in-fresh-sanctions-idUSKCN1M51WC). “The move adds pressure to a government already widely criticized for economic collapse and undermining democracy.”

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: What I had to say in last night’s debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bredesen for Senate
body:
|
#
Peter -- Last night was the first debate in the U.S. Senate race. I’m glad I had the opportunity to discuss the important issues facing our communities. _Photo via The Tennessean_ Since this campaign began, I’ve been traveling all across the state and meeting with countless Tennesseans. **They all say the same thing: let’s get things done.** During the debate, I talked about how we worked together to get things done in state government -- and promised to bring the same collaborative work ethic to Washington as your next Senator. Unfortunately, we’ve turned into a country where everybody just stands on opposite sides of the room, shouting at each other. Last night, I spoke about wanting to be part of the fix for that -- to start bringing us back together to find solutions to the issues Tennesseans care about. People are working longer hours, but their paycheck doesn’t stretch as far as it used to. Too many families can’t afford health insurance, and the opioid crisis is killing more people each year in Tennessee than car accidents. Congress is paralyzed by hyper-partisanship -- and keeps racking up debt for our kids and grandkids, with no end in sight. When you chip in to our campaign, you’re donating the resources we need to take our message of bringing people together to get things done straight to the voters. And you’re sending a powerful message to Washington politicians that it’s possible to run a successful campaign without giving in to the worst of partisan politics. **That’s why, ahead of this week’s critical end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline, I’m asking again for your help. body:
| | |
---
We've officially begun our final push, friends.
If you've been wondering when the right time to give is, _it's now._ **[_I need you to give $5 - or whatever you can spare - right now to help me flip New Hampshire blue._](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc49b1/d0ce7de/518845a8/9cd8bd3/1158511364/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTQ3LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk147-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
I'll be honest with you: Some people believe I'm the underdog in this race. I'm up against Governor Chris Sununu and the deep pockets of his wealthy corporate donors who are doing everything they can to make sure they're able to keep pushing their agenda in the Granite State.
**But I've got a message for Sununu and his right-wing corporate allies:** ** **
**_Do not underestimate me and the power of this grassroots campaign._**
We're going to show everyone what is possible this year. **That's why I need you to give right now to reach our $10,000 goal before midnight so we can head strongly into November and flip New Hampshire blue. **
[Friends, we need to raise $10,000 before midnight if we're going to pull off this win. Please, give $5 or more right now.](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc49b1/d0ce7de/518845a8/9cd8bd3/1158511364/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTQ3LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk147-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

Every dollar will help me defeat Sununu, take back the corner office for Democrats and stand up for what matters to families like yours.

name: Kim Howard, Team Morse
subject: a critical week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cZD4PkWe0IxJui-5Law76aY4kl_Y_fWH59rbV5cMn2w=/dZmJapxCnJ3ch3OL8NU4NIhMIqO3oSQzAAUpwCM3ocM=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180925_KH_20180926-eoq1-ndnr_ndnr_logo)
Team, this is an absolutely critical week for our campaign.
Less than six weeks are left until Election Day, and SUNDAY is the final deadline for our last quarterly filing report for the FEC.
All indicators show that Jessica and Tom McClintock are neck and neck. McClintock now has TV ads on the air--and thanks to his corporate donors, he currently has more money on hand than we do, which means he's better able to get his message out.
To stay competitive in this race, **we MUST hit our fundraising goal of raising $25,000 by Sunday at midnight --falling short is not an option.**
**The FEC publishes our quarterly reports, making this one of your last chances to get your support for Jessica on the public record --make sure you get your contribution in while it counts. Even $5 can help: **

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: I believe women
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f1/9e00690/5c7fcf6b/240131d3/2293723870/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180925_SCOTUS_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx&source=em18_180925_SCOTUS_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx")
Friends,

At a time when the American people can't depend on officials at the highest levels to defend women or treat them fairly, we need the right leaders in place at the state level to protect the progress we've made.

Recently, Dr. Christine Blasey Ford came forward with credible allegations that President Trump's latest pick for the Supreme Court, Judge Brett Kavanaugh, sexually assaulted her when they were both in high school. **I believe Dr. Ford and I believe that she should be able to tell her story.**

With more reports that more women are coming forward, these credible allegations should be a factor in every senator's consideration of Kavanaugh's nomination to the Court -- as should his record of dangerous rulings on women's healthcare, workers' rights, and voting rights.

As we fight this nomination with every tool at our disposal, we also need to be aware of a fight right here in Florida. Rick Scott wants to nominate three new Supreme Court justices on his final hours next January, even though a coalition of groups has tried to give our next Governor the ability to choose those judges.

Our campaign isn't just about the next four years -- it's about the next 40 years. We need judges who will help make this state a more equal and compassionate state, instead of letting the special interests run wild.

**Now is the time for us to stand up for a justice system that works for everyday people -- not the special interests.**

**[I promise that as your next Governor, I'll appoint qualified judges who reflect the diversity of our state -- can you chip in $5 to stand with us in this fight for justice?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f1/9e00690/5c7fcf6b/240131eb/2293723870/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-scotus-resend?gpsid=8_55_3837&refcode=em18_180925_SCOTUS_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180925_SCOTUS_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+I+promise+that+as+your+next+Governor+Ill")**

Thank you,

Andrew

**[P.S. Click here to find the phone number for your U.S. Senators and tell them to vote no on Judge Brett Kavanaugh.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f1/9e00690/5c7fcf6b/240131ea/2293723870/VEsHBQ/ "https://www.senate.gov/general/contact_information/senators_cfm.cfm?OrderBy=state&Sort=ASC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=10+-+PS+Click+here+to+find+the+phone+number+f&utm_campaign=em18_180925_SCOTUS_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx&source=em18_180925_SCOTUS_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f1/9e00690/5c7fcf6b/240131ed/2293723870/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=11+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_180925_SCOTUS_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f1/9e00690/5c7fcf6b/240131ef/2293723870/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=13+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_180925_SCOTUS_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx&source=em18_180925_SCOTUS_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx")

name: Chris Evans, betofortexas.com
subject: True to form
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

The reviews are in, and Beto crushed last Friday's debate against Senator
Cruz. He presented his positive vision for the future of our state and our country, and he
shared the stories of people he’s met along the way during his travels to
each of Texas’ 254 counties.

And true to form, he hasn’t slowed down for one second -- visiting 10
cities since Friday’s debate. But we can’t slow down either. There’s so
much momentum on our side: tens of thousands of volunteers are working
around the clock to elect Beto, we’re within single digits of Senator Cruz
-- and, right now, we’re up against the steepest end-of-quarter
fundraising goal in the campaign. We can’t afford to fall short. Not with
so much on the line. Not with everyone watching so closely.

[20]Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180926&t=1019&akid=13124%2E444211%2EuEC6e_ ]We need you to pitch in a
donation of
$3
today to make sure we stay on track to reach our goal: raising $5 million
from grassroots donations before midnight on September 30.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180926&t=1020&akid=13124%2E444211%2EuEC6e_ ]Contribute
$3
»

On Sunday, Beto and Cruz will face off in another debate, this time in
Houston. We need to make sure Beto knows we’re all in his corner.

Up to ten outside groups have pledged to spend millions in Texas to prop
up Cruz. And after they saw Beto in last Friday’s debate, you can bet
Cruz's dark-money supporters are trying to figure out where they can spend
their millions to hurt Beto the most and take his momentum away.

With just a few short weeks left until Election Day, we know they’re going
to fight back harder than ever. The distorted attack ads we’ve seen will
get nastier. We need to counter their attacks with a strength that can
only come from Texas, a strength that embodies what Beto is doing for all
of us on a daily basis.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180926&t=1021&akid=13124%2E444211%2EuEC6e_ ]I’m counting on you to step up
to help Beto reach the final FEC fundraising deadline of our campaign.
It’s definitely make-or-break on this one. Pitch in
a contribution of
$3
right now.

Let’s keep up the intensity over the final few weeks of the campaign. I’m
glad we can count on your help.

Talk soon,

Chris Evans
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180926&t=1022&akid=13124%2E444211%2EuEC6e_ ]Contribute
$3
»

wouldn't have joined the Nazi Party" - Art Jones (our opponent)

Peter — Our opponent, the avowed
white nationalist leader Art Jones, is doing whatever he can to
try and win Dan’s seat.

Huge swaths of our district have no idea that Jones is an
anti-Semite and a white nationalist. It’s up to us to get the
message out over the next 41 days.

In the primary Jones won over 20,000 votes by calling himself
a Republican. In November, every single vote that Jones gets will
be more fuel for his white nationalist agenda.

This Sunday is the last Federal Election Commission (FEC)
quarterly fundraising deadline before Election Day. Art Jones
won’t be filing his report, but we’re filing ours.

"I'm not filing any (FEC) reports. I'm not going to give the
Jews an opportunity to harass my supporters until after the
election." — Art Jones

Our goal is to raise $10,000 and use it ALL to educate voters
about Jones’ white nationalist agenda. We only have until
midnight Sunday before we close the books on our last FEC report
before Election Day. Contribute here to help.
( http://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-defeat-jones?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_180926_1_1&amount=15&recurring=auto&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

We cannot let apathy pave the way for Jones to win thousands
of votes in November.

Dan has been a tireless fighter for the families in this
district and for practical solutions in Congress. He is a
champion for healthcare, the environment, and our education
system.

Voters trust Dan, and we need you to help him get the truth
out about the white nationalist we’re facing in November.
Contribute here to help us do it.
( http://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-defeat-jones?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_180926_1_1&amount=15&recurring=auto&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

Lipinski for Congress

name: Ben Jealous
subject: We can do this together, I know it.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
We can take on this corporate-funded campaign war chest.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3780ee/7ab0e2c4/7e37592a/3498cf77/2239293957/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sept-eoq?refcode=OHQ09268A") We're down to the wire my friend -- it's go time. To be honest, it's been "go time" for a while. You don't take on a fight like this one without putting your heart, soul, blood, sweat, and tears into it every single day. But now, we're so close to the end that it's time to start thinking about the last step -- **getting folks out to vote.** We have a new ad on the air, we have yard signs and phone banks, and we have big plans to get us across the finish line -- but we need to ensure people turn out to bring the blue wave to Maryland. That's why we're launching our Get Out The Vote fund (or GOTV, for short) -- which is dedicated to propelling our work on the ground from now to Election Day, so we can reach folks in every corner of the state. **Before the end of the month, we're trying to raise $25,000 to fill our GOTV fund with donations from folks like you -- folks who are committed to progressive values and a better future for Maryland.** [**Will you donate $5 or more now?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3780ee/7ab0e2c4/7e37592a/3498cf77/2239293957/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sept-eoq?refcode=OHQ09268A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3780ee/7ab0e2c4/7e37592a/3498cf76/2239293957/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sept-eoq?refcode=OHQ09268A&amount=5&express_lane=true")

---

---
| [**$250 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3780ee/7ab0e2c4/7e37592a/3498cf72/2239293957/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sept-eoq?refcode=OHQ09268A&amount=250&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3780ee/7ab0e2c4/7e37592a/3498cf7d/2239293957/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sept-eoq?refcode=OHQ09268A&express_lane=true")
---
Larry Hogan has a $9 million corporate-funded campaign war chest -- but we have something better.
We have donations from folks like you, who give what they can, when they can. Teachers, blue-collar union workers, nurses, moms and dads, grandparents -- all our communities are committed to building something better here.
We need to show on November 6th that progressive values are winning values. We can do it, if we do it together. I know I can count on you -- and with only 41 days left until Election Day, every dollar counts.
[**Let's raise $25,000 to fill our GOTV fund ahead of the final sprint to Election Day -- will you donate $5 or more now?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3780ee/7ab0e2c4/7e37592a/3498cf77/2239293957/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sept-eoq?refcode=OHQ09268A")
Thanks,
Ben

Peter,
_New Jerseyans across the state are coming together to support our campaign._

Because of our hard work and momentum, Bob Menendez is feeling the heat.

National special interest groups and party bosses are buying hundreds of thousands of dollars in ads in a desperate last minute attempt to save their corrupt colleague Bob Menendez and attack Bob Hugin.

**[Help us combat their attacks and stand up for New Jerseyans first by donating any amount>>](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=5d6e417f08a142159c7d5af6d93ef357&_e=OSEjZg4SUBEGnxjzMXaiNnekh73O4UWERxh_O9jJEam-pu64TbbKn6XkW0t1l8JljrEAMYL0j1m_XX4b9mUvrZs40GfwE9Jy4SNuN03e5hIfXmzfXjEZlM_qC7FLx80ORHr4NtxRRCHOgxpW3zNqMQo9I1ktSIgie8UVtMDAizzfPeEf2nTu7PPQTIp-9jjF2SKereRXcfjZSFQcPqgd-I-iVIDEfEHPE3-HAKyls2ZQVJze2I65_2E3xlT9Laze6AC8pJgNpyaTcK3DBpqQo--DCHA4Sm2NdZgNQOAj3s_jXDgdTV2tbTZ-NxkBTw3P_Q3jAuitmRZql9M4cZpQ-VbgEK7WatKd0P6BFqw8wNjn068pb5x7pi6bCNtguuZoztrdgJ1MfIUKsCwmehjebfOaUboX0Lf73EVNJhMBf0I%3D)**

**We need to beat our $50,000 September End of Quarter Fundraising Goal by Midnight on September 30 to put the pressure on Menendez.**

name: Team Menendez
subject: Bob Hugin still backs Kavanaugh (proof)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

"He's a very experienced, thoughtful jurist... **I haven 't heard anything that would say I wouldn't vote for him today.** I think he will be approved."

Does that piss you off? Us too. [**Help us keep Hugin out of the Senate.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cdb/3af3c5d/390b0e12/4ec3d901/2623396026/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_sept_eoq?gpsid=5_73_3883&refcode=em18_180926_KavSup_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180926_KavSup_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+Help+us+keep+Hugin+out+of+the+Senate")

That was a quote from Bob Hugin on PIX11 News Closeup with Marvin Scott last Sunday talking about Brett Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court.

**One more time: Bob Hugin hasn 't heard anything that would deter him from voting against an alleged sexual predator being appointed to the Supreme Court of the United States for life.**

Bob Hugin was anti-women while he was president of the Tiger Inn at Princeton. He was still anti-women in his 30's when he called the New Jersey Supreme Court ruling allowing women into the Tiger Inn, "politically-correct fascism." He was anti-women when he did everything he could to elect openly misogynist Donald Trump.

And he is anti-women now as he stands behind Brett Kavanaugh and Donald Trump.

[**New Jersey women deserve better than Bob Hugin. Chip in $3 or more right now to help Democratic Senator Bob Menendez stand up to the anti-women Bob Hugin.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cdb/3af3c5d/390b0e12/4ec3d900/2623396026/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_sept_eoq?gpsid=5_73_3883&refcode=em18_180926_KavSup_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180926_KavSup_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+New+Jersey+women+deserve+better+than+Bob") **[DONATE](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cdb/3af3c5d/390b0e12/4ec3d903/2623396026/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_sept_eoq?gpsid=5_73_3883&refcode=em18_180926_KavSup_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180926_KavSup_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+DONATE")** Bob Menendez is standing against Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court just as he did in 2006 when he fought against Kavanaugh's nomination to the D.C. Circuit Court of Appeals.

Because Bob Menendez believes the accusers and will always fight for women in New Jersey.

Bob Hugin simply doesn't and will never have New Jersey's back.

[**We can stop him, but time is running out. Chip in $3 or more today to stop Hugin from buying this U.S. Senate seat and continuing his anti-women agenda in Congress. Contribute today >>>**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cdb/3af3c5d/390b0e12/4ec3d902/2623396026/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_sept_eoq?gpsid=5_73_3883&refcode=em18_180926_KavSup_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180926_KavSup_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=4+-+We+can+stop+him+but+time+is+running+out+")

Thank you,

Team Menendez

**[DONATE](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cdb/3af3c5d/390b0e12/4ec3d905/2623396026/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_sept_eoq?gpsid=5_73_3883&refcode=em18_180926_KavSup_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180926_KavSup_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=5+-+DONATE")**

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: What happened last night...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
I told people at the start of this campaign that you won’t find a candidate that works harder than me, and you won’t find a candidate that has more fun than me. Last night, the hard work we’ve been putting in really paid off, and that’s when the fun really starts! Check out this picture from last night’s town hall:
This picture is inspiring to me. It’s energizing to feel the momentum that comes with almost 200 people showing up to hear you speak on a Tuesday night.
As we’ve pointed out before, Steve King doesn’t do public events, he doesn't hold town halls, and he won't debate me. Since Steve King won’t hold even one town hall, I’m holding 39 of them on a tour called, “ _You Can’t Fake Showing Up._ ” This is my THIRD 39-county tour of the district and I’m doing this because **you can’t have a government of the people, by the people, and for the people, if you don’t include the people.**
There’s a feeling on the ground in this district that we’re creating the movement that will defeat Steve King, but I don’t plan on letting up for even a minute. And I need your help. Town halls in each county of this huge district means a lot of driving, a lot of literature, and a lot of planning and staffing. **Your support is the key to winning this race**. [**_Help support our 39-county tour and drive home this victory with a contribution today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2344949/12880298/-1042605697?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDgxOGZiMC1jMmMxLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DObL8kJ0ak8hb5G14ATOqR4Jb2O4ee0bXDtw4MiLFLo=)
Thank you.

J.D. Scholten

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4d4cf76b2f3748c49b8496af1a6f75f3&_e=HSB6yZBlbMxWuKb0XKwdXDoMcqWKvZap-yyScvkR8h7RmTM42qcRbb6ik5jsBSwDGb1hfXu-5XHXGnu-zchGO_0Tex0CR6ZmHxKx32XbWwM4_VrPrghsD_eUnGWWfdmvAKsVy9H0ZJAXekO2d3nTFXLxbXFzz_SpI1BKNdXV5CutiaIMv4ov8HZxxr3VEZ1qa-Zc2X5fLQaiEDfqbvszjQdpr2x5wnbSGVMseyPclcSIlIzr0bDQ3EAd3ODVPNR7zKjboyVnG9QOf0-XWsy4l8mGCT0huZOADeEZ-h-xgpFByewaneOIJGPaW6HKgyUiGoLYz9U0-Zk56O_n_QssfQ-GTI5X8rsbANZmKb_bFbavofdFDxJAP3lL6__zXHIv) that you care about? body:
Friend --

When I told Chris that we needed to find $50,000 before the end of the month to reach our spending goals, he assured me that our supporters could help us get there. **He was right.**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5-bqhAxMZMzLgsa1fn1o2uVi_n7Rjz0iOvQ6hIWdAhc=/EY_vWKlP1xveC9ss0Xr8VUvwxKmwj2eY58IOtOZbuec=?gpsid=37_57_3887&refcode=em18_180926_EOQ2_IG_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180926_EOQ2_IG_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

We have already managed to pull in just under $10,000 -- already 20% of the way to our goal. **And we still have time!**

**[If you have not contributed towards this goal, please consider a donation of any size today. Every dollar counts.](https://act.myngp.com/el/5-bqhAxMZMzLgsa1fn1o2uVi_n7Rjz0iOvQ6hIWdAhc=/EY_vWKlP1xveC9ss0Xr8VUvwxKmwj2eY58IOtOZbuec=?gpsid=37_57_3887&refcode=em18_180926_EOQ2_L1_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180926_EOQ2_L1_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Mandi
Finance Director
Steve Sisolak for Governor

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Chris Sloan, Steve Sisolak for Governor <info@stevesisolak.com>
Date: Tuesday, September 25, 2018, at 3:00 pm
Subject: Falling short
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5-bqhAxMZMzLgsa1fn1o2uVi_n7Rjz0iOvQ6hIWdAhc=/EY_vWKlP1xveC9ss0Xr8VUvwxKmwj2eY58IOtOZbuec=?gpsid=37_57_3887&refcode=em18_180926_EOQ2_LG_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180926_EOQ2_LG_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

Friend,

I'll get right to it: **we need to raise $50,000 before midnight on September 30** \-- our last filing deadline of the cycle -- our last chance to show everyone that Steve is the right man for the job.

Falling short of this goal is just not an option if we want to pull off a historic victory for this state and this country. Whether we reach this goal will determine where our campaign is able to spend critical resources in the final few weeks before Election Day. Whether we'll be able to compete in all 17 counties.

Falling short of this goal is just not an option if we want to pull off a historic victory for this state and this country. We can't afford to fall short, team:

Right now it doesn't look like we're going to meet our $15,000 match goal by the deadline, and missing this goal could be devastating.

**_[With our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline also approaching, we really can't afford to miss this goal. Can you chip in $5 (becomes $10) today?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180926_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Bob called out the president's corrupt bargain with corporate special interests over this Supreme Court nomination, and the attacks haven't stopped since. The president came to Pennsylvania last month, where he attacked Bob for refusing to support the Trump administration's dangerous and divisive agenda without question.

These attacks from the very top of the Republican establishment won't stop, and this campaign needs to be ready to fight back. The budget is tight, and if we don't meet this match goal, the advertising budget will be on the chopping block. This match opportunity is a chance for supporters to make a game-changing investment to protect Pennsylvania's only Democratic Senate seat, and we can't let it slip away.

**We don't have much time before the match expires, and there is another $9,270 left to unlock. Can you help support Bob before the deadline? name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: FW: Did you see the new poll?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Your continued, generous support has enabled our campaign to reach more voters with our message of bringing accountable leadership to Central Virginia -- and it is resonating, to the point that our race is now a tie among likely voters.
| | Peter, I hope you had a chance to read the exciting news about our race below. Your [**continued, generous support**](https://act.myngp.com/el/iyJiLzldyLOcHprVfCZNdtRW8XlDY-IecPvgoOD_zFw=/Jj1TWdSxGlFLqeFVmafIz--x8Bab_GcRbC4YIDXXdPo=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.26_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) has enabled our campaign to reach more voters with our message of bringing accountable leadership to Central Virginia -- **and it is resonating, to the point that our race is now a tie among likely voters,** according to this new poll. It's a real toss-up! But we still have work to do. This is just one poll, there are still 41 days until the election, and enough undecided voters remain to swing this race in either direction. **We will keep fighting for every vote, every day until the polls close on November 6th.** We would not be where we are today -- with victory in sight -- without you. [**Peter, consider making a donation today to help us keep up the fight.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/iyJiLzldyLOcHprVfCZNdtRW8XlDY-IecPvgoOD_zFw=/Jj1TWdSxGlFLqeFVmafIz--x8Bab_GcRbC4YIDXXdPo=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.26_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thank you, \- Abigail \-----forwarded message----- From: Dana Bye Sent: Tue, Sep 25, 4:41 PM Subject: Did you see the new poll? Friends, Two weeks ago, we wrote you with the news that a poll of VA-7 found that our race was within the margin of error. Today, another survey of our race was released, this one from the reputable pollsters at Monmouth University -- _and they found that Team Spanberger is gaining ground._ **According to this new poll of likely voters,_our race is now a tie, 47 percent to 47 percent._** Friends, this race is a true toss-up, and we are counting on our grassroots supporters to help us take this impressive result and pull ahead. [**Will you make a donation today so we can earn the support of more undecided voters and turn this tied race into a win?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/iyJiLzldyLOcHprVfCZNdtRW8XlDY-IecPvgoOD_zFw=/Jj1TWdSxGlFLqeFVmafIz--x8Bab_GcRbC4YIDXXdPo=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.26_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) The topline result is itself encouraging -- and the details give us even more reason to be optimistic. There are still undecided voters to reach, and **this survey projects that Abigail would actually _lead_ Rep. Dave Brat** if turnout among Democrats surged above typical levels for a midterm election. This may be a historically Republican district -- but Abigail's message of positive change is resonating. With exactly 6 weeks to go until Election Day, it's now on us to tell more voters about Abigail and then get our supporters to the polls. [**Please make a donation today to help us make it happen.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/iyJiLzldyLOcHprVfCZNdtRW8XlDY-IecPvgoOD_zFw=/Jj1TWdSxGlFLqeFVmafIz--x8Bab_GcRbC4YIDXXdPo=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.26_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/iyJiLzldyLOcHprVfCZNdtRW8XlDY-IecPvgoOD_zFw=/Jj1TWdSxGlFLqeFVmafIz--x8Bab_GcRbC4YIDXXdPo=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.26_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/iyJiLzldyLOcHprVfCZNdtRW8XlDY-IecPvgoOD_zFw=/Jj1TWdSxGlFLqeFVmafIz--x8Bab_GcRbC4YIDXXdPo=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/iyJiLzldyLOcHprVfCZNdtRW8XlDY-IecPvgoOD_zFw=/6-SPj194z-LDGilWQg5O5Gc5QdeIc5K4hhZbzJkatKw=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/iyJiLzldyLOcHprVfCZNdtRW8XlDY-IecPvgoOD_zFw=/lxwCF5IqYkckXogNC7j3T6kaZszutM4y1wApRcPOgNw=).

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: I believe Professor Ford
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
|
---
[ ](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a00a/5e076a9e/54eb2a36/14425c48/2976407580/VEsH/ "http://ginaraimondo.com")

| | Hi friend, I believe Dr. Christine Blasey Ford. The stories out of Washington have implications in Rhode Island. The cyber bullying and coordinated efforts to dismiss her and other women's credible accusations against Brett Kavanaugh send a dangerous signal to Rhode Island girls, women and anyone else who has been abused or assaulted. Every Rhode Islander deserves to grow up and live in a society free of abuse, bullying and harassment; and we must create a community that gives comfort and support to everyone with the courage to come forward and tell their story. **[Sign up to volunteer with my campaign so Rhode Island can continue to stand up to Trump.](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a00a/5e076a9e/54eb2a36/14425c4b/2976407580/VEsE/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/signup/volunteer")** I personally believe that Judge Kavanaugh's views will take our nation and state backwards, but the serious, credible accusations of sexual assault from multiple women are disqualifying. My opponents - Allan Fung and Joe Trillo - have not said a word about their support for or against Judge Kavanaugh's nomination. Even worse, they've joined the chorus of Trump surrogates and supporters dismissing or minimizing the allegations as a case of 'he said, she said.' Today's Providence Journal reports that "[p]ressure from ... activists did not convince either Fung or Trillo to take a position on whether or not Kavanaugh should be confirmed.1" **[Can you volunteer with my campaign and stand up against Fung and Trillo's complicit behavior?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a00a/5e076a9e/54eb2a36/14425c4b/2976407580/VEsF/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/signup/volunteer")** As long as I am Governor, I will continue to stand up against the Trump administration's bullying behavior and stand up with women, girls and every other ally to root out harassment and abuse. My opponents will not. \-- Gina **PS - There's too much at risk this November. Rhode Island needs a Governor willing to stand up against abuse, harassment and bullying. [Can you volunteer?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a00a/5e076a9e/54eb2a36/14425c4b/2976407580/VEsC/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/signup/volunteer")**
* * *
1\. Providence Journal: [Raimondo allies push Fung, Trillo to take a stand on Kavanaugh | Poll](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a00a/5e076a9e/54eb2a36/14425c4a/2976407580/VEsD/ "http://www.providencejournal.com/news/20180925/raimondo-allies-push-fung-trillo-to-take-stand-on-kavanaugh--poll")
---
|

PO Box 40794
Providence, RI 02940

Every Rhode Islander deserves to grow up and live in a society free of abuse, bullying and harassment; and we must create a community that gives comfort and support to everyone with the courage to come forward and tell their story. "" I personally believe that Judge Kavanaugh's views will take our nation and state backwards, but the serious, credible accusations of sexual assault from multiple women are disqualifying. My opponents - Allan Fung and Joe Trillo - have not said a word about their support for or against Judge Kavanaugh's nomination. Even worse, they've joined the chorus of Trump surrogates and supporters dismissing or minimizing the allegations as a case of 'he said, she said.' Today's Providence Journal reports that "[p]ressure from ... activists did not convince either Fung or Trillo to take a position on whether or not Kavanaugh should be confirmed.1" "" As long as I am Governor, I will continue to stand up against the Trump administration's bullying behavior and stand up with women, girls and every other ally to root out harassment and abuse. My opponents will not. \-- Gina PS - There's too much at risk this November. Rhode Island needs a Governor willing to stand up against abuse, harassment and bullying. "" * 1\. Providence Journal: "" | "" "" "" Friends of Gina Raimondo PO Box 40794 Providence, RI 02940 This email is not intended for any Rhode Island state government employees. If you are a Rhode Island state government employee, please disregard and let us know so we can unsubscribe you from future emails. Per Rhode Island State Law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $1,000 per year. Business and corporate checks are prohibited.

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: This is a moral issue
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f0/9e00690/5c52daa5/2401336d/388119172/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180926_HC_ad1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&source=em18_180926_HC_ad1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx")
Friends,

No one should ever be one illness away from bankruptcy. And the scariest part about getting sick shouldn't be trying to figure out how your family is going to pay for it -- but for too many Floridians that's the case.

I find the constant attacks on affordable healthcare insulting, both as someone who grew up in a working-class family that went to the free dental clinic whenever the time came and as someone with at least an ounce of human decency.

I believe that healthcare should be a right, not a privilege -- and everyone should have access to the care they need when they need it. That's why, as Governor, I will fight to make affordable healthcare a right for every Floridian -- but I need your help to make sure every voter knows it.

**[Watch our newest TV ad about how I plan to fight for affordable healthcare, then chip in $5 to help us make sure we can keep it on the air as long as possible.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f0/9e00690/5c52daa5/2401336c/388119172/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-healthcare-ad?gpsid=13_55_3899&refcode=em18_180926_HC_ad1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180926_HC_ad1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&noskip=true&utm_content=2+-+Watch+our+newest+TV+ad+about+how+I+plan+")**

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f0/9e00690/5c52daa5/2401336f/388119172/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-healthcare-ad?gpsid=13_55_3899&refcode=em18_180926_HC_ad1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180926_HC_ad1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&noskip=true&utm_content=3")
People's lives are at stake. And the constant threat of taking away affordable healthcare is a direct assault on the most vulnerable among us, our seniors, and the working and middle-class families of America. This isn't a political issue, it's a moral one -- but sadly, Ron DeSantis seems to disagree.

In Congress, DeSantis voted to cut guaranteed benefits for Medicare and to eliminate healthcare protections for people with pre-existing conditions, and he opposed expanding Medicaid, which would have provided affordable healthcare coverage to over 800,000 working Floridians.

It's clear DeSantis has the wrong priorities for Floridians and their healthcare -- which is why it's so important to make sure voters across the state know they have a candidate who will put them first.

**[Together, I know we can make healthcare affordable for all Floridians -- but I need your help to do it. Watch our new TV ad, then chip in $5 to keep it on the air.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f0/9e00690/5c52daa5/2401336e/388119172/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-healthcare-ad?gpsid=13_55_3899&refcode=em18_180926_HC_ad1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180926_HC_ad1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&noskip=true&utm_content=4+-+Together+I+know+we+can+make+healthcare+a")**

Bring it home,

Andrew Gillum

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f0/9e00690/5c52daa5/24013361/388119172/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-healthcare-ad?gpsid=13_55_3899&refcode=em18_180926_HC_ad1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180926_HC_ad1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=5+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f0/9e00690/5c52daa5/24013360/388119172/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=6+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_180926_HC_ad1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f0/9e00690/5c52daa5/24013363/388119172/VEsB/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=7+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em18_180926_HC_ad1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&source=em18_180926_HC_ad1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f0/9e00690/5c52daa5/24013362/388119172/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=8+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_180926_HC_ad1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&source=em18_180926_HC_ad1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx")

body:
Sacramento has it out for the Valley. They insist on forcing their liberal values on our communities and taxing everything in sight.
Friend,

Sacramento has it out for the Valley. They insist on forcing their liberal values on our communities and taxing everything in sight.

But they don’t stop there. Not even our water is safe from the clutches of liberals in Sacramento.

This radical water grab is a danger to our homes, businesses, and local farms. We absolutely cannot afford to have 40% of our water flushed away into the ocean.

Friend, I for one don’t think Sacramento has our best interests in mind, and I think you’ll agree with me. That’s why we need to take swift action to fight back and stand up for our communities.

[REJECT Sacramento's Water Grab](http://links.jeffdenham.com/u/click?_t=ae4e127997b64fdfa10e37f90fe2a78d&_m=8852f2bc47a74862b8c2733be1cf4282&_e=qmZO1tHrh63_41Xk28V_qG0aCGGZgee1RWHHGuNgfpc6cghanhhWKgph2qG8BgniVrmg_85ZZPsbOatnBl9hIjCoME-MUNEmFcHZup1JxkeGCiakN17C5YoDjd2PcRAS8L8Ojldcelj3PjTxAoB8WeBDrWI07b4FHa10tgElvyACQk7JX-mDrzQkm0Auk7eji5efLRi7oKDwBmEeyvXMuNcbSw7yRmP47YY9XKPENOiyJ1E-Wk9no6AIJY7oOTT1ytBqC7vCy40UJjbYQjfDQu5fu5KhCSi1HzwIg0HRI0KoHFWF9kX7HbQhhxv-x10-6D4vcyCsskp07GE-EMupxI-dtTw-so2enWvbPk_8icaNp4zD4iKHfzGvk7HjhaAVFHPuttuat-fGyIqwPT-32SUfXzpxpR9x4PpFCsD_Kr4zIDbdG5F-vWvvHreqZ-Ex)

To Democrats like Claire McCaskill and Chuck Schumer, obstructing Kavanaugh's confirmation goes beyond just keeping him off the Court. **They don't only want to block this nominee; they want to block every judge Trump nominates during his presidency, ensuring that no qualified conservative judges get confirmed for years.** This unprecedented attack on our justice system _must be stopped._ All they need to accomplish this, though, is to win a majority in the Senate. The stakes have never been higher; we must make sure Democrats don’t get anywhere close to flipping the Senate in November, which means we have to defeat rubber stamp Senators like Claire McCaskill. name: Tim Kaine
subject: Open this before tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, I head to the debate stage this evening.

I intend to represent Virginians, the way we view things pragmatically, as problem solvers, and with big hearts. _But I can only control my side of the stage._

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: Texas could unlock the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
This could be the year we turn Texas blue, Friends. **Beto O'Rourke is running a neck and neck race against Ted Cruz - and a recent poll shows them _TIED_! **

Beto has been gaining ground in this deep-red state for months - that's why The Cook Political Report just moved this race to a "toss-up" and why the GOP is terrified.

**Winning in Texas would give Democrats a clear path to take back the Senate majority** , so the GOP and right-wing groups are going all-in to defeat him - sending Donald Trump to campaign and spending _millions._

But Beto doesn't accept money from PACs or special-interest groups, so he's relying on our grassroots support. Without it, he could easily lose this race. So I'm reaching out to you: **Can I count on you to donate $5 before midnight to help us rush $10,000 to Beto so he can push toward a historic win in Texas and taking back the Senate in November?
****
[Donate $5 before the midnight deadline to power Beto to victory in Texas so we can take back the Senate for Democrats](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4bo?refcode=jtk912-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500).**

____If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be evenly split between Beto O'Rourke and Jeanne Shaheen:____ **[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4bo?refcode=jtk912-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5)** **[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4bo?refcode=jtk912-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25)** **[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4bo?refcode=jtk912-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50)** **[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4bo?refcode=jtk912-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you,

Jeanne

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Why this deadline matters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | This is it -- On Sunday, I will face the most critical Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline of my Senate reelection campaign yet.

**This is the final quarterly deadline before the election, and my first head-to-head against Libertarian Gary Johnson.** This could not be more critical. Read more below on why this is a make-or-break moment for the rest of my campaign. Or, if you've heard enough:

**_[Help me reach our final quarterly FEC fundraising goal before we must publicly report our numbers>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Help+me+reach+our+final+quarterly+FEC+fu&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1")_**

* * *

Just over a month ago, my Senate race was flipped on its head when Libertarian Gary Johnson announced that he was challenging me for the Senate.

Since then, I've been amazed by the outpouring of support as we brace for the attacks we know are coming from Johnson and national Libertarian super PACs. Now, we're facing our first real fundraising test since Johnson entered the race.

**Sunday is the last quarterly FEC deadline before the election, and****afterwards****I will have to report my fundraising numbers for the first time since Johnson challenged me. With Johnson giving six-figures to his own campaign, we can 't afford a weak showing.**

**[DONATE $29 NOW>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+ask+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1")**
I already had a target on my back before Johnson entered the race. I've worked hard in the Senate to protect health care, public lands, and workers' rights -- which is why the Koch brothers launched ads against me earlier this year.

**Simply put: the stakes have never been higher for me.** That's why my team and I are focusing on more grassroots organizing and expanding our ad spending to reach as many voters as possible.

**_[That is why I am asking for your support today. To expand our campaign in the final weeks before voting begins, our new budget goal is to raise an additional $75,000 before our Sunday deadline. This is my first Senate reelection race, and all our hard work and more will be undone if Johnson or my extreme Republican opponent defeats me in November. Will you pitch in now and help us close our budget gap before we publically report our numbers?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+That+is+why+I+am+asking+for+your+support&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1")_**

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
**[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1")** **[Donate $29 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?express_lane=true&amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1")** ****[Donate $50 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1")** Thank you for your support,

Martin

**If you want to be the first to know what we're working on next,[sign up for text updates.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b7f2/43d8135f/66a6f3ff/51007fda/1430298728/VEsHBA/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/texts?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=11+-+sign+up+for+text+updates&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1")**

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a key part of our grassroots team. If you would like to unsubscribe from these emails click [here](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b7f2/43d8135f/66a6f3ff/51007fdd/1430298728/VEsHBw/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180926_1_1").

Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: President Trump chairs U.N. Security Council
body:
| |
---
The White House • September 26, 2018
## President Trump chairs U.N. Security Council
##
##
**“To be successful, we need a commitment** of every nation represented in this chamber. Acting together, we can replace the horrors of war with the blessings of safety and the beautiful promise of peace,” President Donald J. Trump told members of the United Nations Security Council today in New York. President Trump chaired this morning’s briefing on counterproliferation—the 8,362nd meeting of the Council. **Nations of the world** have long recognized the danger of chemical, biological, and nuclear weapons. Under President Trump’s leadership, the United States and its allies have taken bold action to confront the worldwide threat to international peace and security posed by such weapons:
* Holding the Syrian regime accountable: Earlier this year, the United States, France, and the United Kingdom launched precision strikes on targets associated with Syria’s chemical weapons capabilities.
* Standing up to Iran: President Trump withdrew America from the Iran nuclear deal and began reimposing sanctions to ensure the Iranian regime is permanently denied all paths to a nuclear weapon.
* Working to denuclearize North Korea: President Trump and North Korean leader Kim Jong Un held a historic summit in Singapore in June. North Korea has not conducted a nuclear test in more than a year or a missile test in 10 months.

**“Many of us are rightly focused** on the dangers of nuclear weapons, but we must never forget the risk posed by biological and chemical weapons,” the President said today. “The United States was one of the first nations to unilaterally renounce the use of biological weapons and since World War I we have led international efforts against the scourge of chemical warfare.” **For generations** , world leaders and diplomats came to the United Nations with the same noble goal, President Trump said: “to build a future worthy of the patriots . . . who sacrificed their lives for our nation.” [**How America is fighting to stop the spread of weapons of mass destruction**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI2Ljk1NDE0MTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNi45NTQxNDEwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkxMjIzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-committed-countering-proliferation-chemical-biological-nuclear-weapons/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **Watch** : [**President Trump kicks off this morning’s Security Council meeting**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI2Ljk1NDE0MTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNi45NTQxNDEwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkxMjIzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1044972679965659142)
## ‘Consumer Confidence Rises to Highest Level in 18 Years’
##
**Week after week,** positive economic news continues to pour in. This time, it came in the form of broad confidence that consumers have in the Trump Economy. **Confidence among consumers** reached its highest level in 18 years this month, according to the Consumer Board’s index. “Consumers’ assessment of current conditions remains extremely favorable, bolstered by a strong economy and robust job growth,” said Lynn Franco, the Conference Board’s director of economic indicators. “**The Conference Board also said** optimism about the short-term outlook improved considerably this month, with 27.6 percent of consumers expecting business conditions to improve over the next six months,” Fred Imbert reports. [**CNBC: “Consumer Confidence Rises to Highest Level in 18 Years”**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI2Ljk1NDE0MTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNi45NTQxNDEwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkxMjIzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/cnbc-consumer-confidence-rises-highest-level-18-years/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## Photo of the Day

clean_body: | | The White House • September 26, 2018 President Trump chairs U.N. Security Council “To be successful, we need a commitment of every nation represented in this chamber. Acting together, we can replace the horrors of war with the blessings of safety and the beautiful promise of peace,” President Donald J. Trump told members of the United Nations Security Council today in New York. President Trump chaired this morning’s briefing on counterproliferation—the 8,362nd meeting of the Council. Nations of the world have long recognized the danger of chemical, biological, and nuclear weapons. Under President Trump’s leadership, the United States and its allies have taken bold action to confront the worldwide threat to international peace and security posed by such weapons: Holding the Syrian regime accountable: Earlier this year, the United States, France, and the United Kingdom launched precision strikes on targets associated with Syria’s chemical weapons capabilities. Standing up to Iran: President Trump withdrew America from the Iran nuclear deal and began reimposing sanctions to ensure the Iranian regime is permanently denied all paths to a nuclear weapon. Working to denuclearize North Korea: President Trump and North Korean leader Kim Jong Un held a historic summit in Singapore in June. North Korea has not conducted a nuclear test in more than a year or a missile test in 10 months. “Many of us are rightly focused on the dangers of nuclear weapons, but we must never forget the risk posed by biological and chemical weapons,” the President said today. “The United States was one of the first nations to unilaterally renounce the use of biological weapons and since World War I we have led international efforts against the scourge of chemical warfare.” For generations , world leaders and diplomats came to the United Nations with the same noble goal, President Trump said: “to build a future worthy of the patriots . . . who sacrificed their lives for our nation.” Watch : ‘Consumer Confidence Rises to Highest Level in 18 Years’ Week after week, positive economic news continues to pour in. This time, it came in the form of broad confidence that consumers have in the Trump Economy. Confidence among consumers reached its highest level in 18 years this month, according to the Consumer Board’s index. “Consumers’ assessment of current conditions remains extremely favorable, bolstered by a strong economy and robust job growth,” said Lynn Franco, the Conference Board’s director of economic indicators. “The Conference Board also said optimism about the short-term outlook improved considerably this month, with 27.6 percent of consumers expecting business conditions to improve over the next six months,” Fred Imbert reports. Photo of the Day Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead President Donald J. Trump delivers remarks during the United Nations Security Council Briefing on Counterproliferation at U.N. Headquarters in New York** | September 26, 2018 | |

name: Steny Hoyer
subject: why I support Greg
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend,

We're in the final stretch of the most critical midterm election our nation has ever experienced. This November we must, and I mean we must, elect more effective, pragmatic leaders like Mayor Greg Stanton to Congress.

You probably already saw this, but Mayor Stanton's opponent is supported by the Congressional Leadership Fund which is a Super PAC funded by special interests. Clearly, they feel that Greg's pledge to remove special interests and their dark money from our politics is a threat to them.

[**So that 's why I'm writing - to ask for your help in making sure Greg and his team have the resources they need to fight back. name: Jacqueline Burns
subject: Fwd: Only 2 Weeks Until Ballots Go Out! Lets Get the Word Out About Jessica!
body:
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Jacqueline Burns** <[jacqueline@morse4congress.com](mailto:jacqueline@morse4congress.com)>
Date: Mon, Sep 24, 2018 at 7:06 PM
Subject: Only 2 Weeks Until Ballots Go Out! Lets Get the Word Out About Jessica!
To: Lorna Tirman <[ljtirman@msn.com](mailto:ljtirman@msn.com)>

**Hello Amazing Truckee/Tahoe #MorseForce!**

In case you missed it, Jessica absolutely KILLED at the debate in Mariposa yesterday! You can watch the entire debate here: <https://www.facebook.com/Morse4America/videos/554341971681922/>

Last week we knocked on around 400 doors Truckee, and around 350 on the North and West Shores! That means we have just under 600 left to go in Truckee and around 800 left on the North and West Shores before vote-by-mail ballots go out on October 8th. We can absolutely make this goal if we work together, so _**please everyone lets sign-up for a shift this week!**_ The more we do before October 8th, the easier Get-out-the-Vote will be!
** _
_**
**_CANVASS LAUNCHES_**

**** _TRUCKEE_****
**When:** Saturday and Sunday, September 29-30
**Where:** Truckee Office, 11425 Donner Pass Rd, Truckee, CA 96161
**Shifts:** 9am-12pm, 12pm-3pm, and 3pm-6pm
** _
_**
**_NORTH SHORE (Kings Beach)_**
**When:** Saturday, September 29
**Where:** Tee May's House, 7201 Pino Ave, Tahoe Vista, CA**(****
Corner of Pino and East and West Agatam)
**
**Shift:** 9am-1pm
**
**
** _WEST SHORE (Tahoma/Homewood)_**
**When:** Sunday, September 30
**Where:** Meet at the Homewood Ski Area Main Lodge, at the back of the parking area,** 5145 W Lake Blvd, Homewood, CA 96141**
**
Shift: 9am-1pm
**
**
**
**_OTHER TIMES_**
You can canvass any day you want! Just let Jackie know and she will get you set-up with a walk list and materials.

**_PHONE BANKING - WITH THE NEW AUTODIALER!!!_**
**_
_**
We will phone bank EVERY Monday from 5-8pm in our Truckee office!

_Other Times:_ **
We can also set you up to phone bank on other days/times from home, just let Jackie know to get you scheduled to use an autodialer line.
**

**
**_PLEASE RSVP_**
**Please, please let us know which events you will be attending so we have enough materials and refreshments - or if you want to canvass or phone bank at different times! Please RSVP to all events to:**[jacqueline@morse4congress.com](mailto:jacqueline@morse4congress.com) and [ljtirman@msn.com](mailto:ljtirman@msn.com)
**

\--

Jackie Burns
Field Organizer
(612) 212-2779
[jacqueline@morse4congress.com](mailto:jacqueline@morse4congress.com)

\--

Jackie Burns
Field Organizer
(612) 212-2779
[jacqueline@morse4congress.com](mailto:jacqueline@morse4congress.com)
