name: Steve Sisolak
subject: In Reno
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/74D-uRLpaH5QTc9zsRDCI4nch3BWS0ye37-MCW4CpL0=/gtyeYTor1kaFqPZzLjp3hrKm-y_uITbZZvEfVjvcmSg=?gpsid=37_57_3911&refcode=em18_180926_EOQ3_LG_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180926_EOQ3_LG_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
---
Friend,

I am thrilled to be spending the day in Reno listening to the issues facing Nevada voters. And while folks have serious concerns about the direction our country is heading, people are fired up about Election Day.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/74D-uRLpaH5QTc9zsRDCI4nch3BWS0ye37-MCW4CpL0=/gtyeYTor1kaFqPZzLjp3hrKm-y_uITbZZvEfVjvcmSg=?gpsid=37_57_3911&refcode=em18_180926_EOQ3_IG_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180926_EOQ3_IG_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

The energy here is amazing. I am fired up and ready to fight for Nevadans across the state.

name: Bob Casey
subject: PA can't afford the alternative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6250/51dbcc2a/13aa6f18/3ab9720/3650887038/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
I don't know if you saw this, team, but recently _CNN_ published an article explaining how Democrats can't expect to win the Senate if I lose.

With 41 days to go until Pennsylvanians vote, we've never had more at risk. I've been proud to stand as a firewall against the most dangerous parts of the President's agenda, but I won't be able to do that for PA if I lose this year.

**_[In order to give Democrats a real chance at taking the Senate majority, I need your help to make sure we're able to keep fighting. Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can today to help?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180926_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Quality, affordable health care, Medicaid, Medicare and Social Security are all on the line this year. While I've fought to make sure Pennsylvania families and workers have a chance to get ahead, my opponent has been advocating for the most dangerous pieces of the President's agenda. Pennsylvanians can't afford to have someone in office who puts them second.

**I've seen what happens when Pennsylvania goes red, and so has the GOP. We can't afford to have that happen again. Will you join me in fighting for PA by donating to my campaign today?**

Here's the best link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/donate](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180926_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,

Bob

Will you make your first donation to help out?

name: Erin Dolan
subject: It cannot be said enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

Another day, another reason that proves that **Bob Hugin is wrong for New Jersey.**

Brett Kavanaugh has now been accused of sexual assault by multiple different women. And he still has the support of Bob Hugin. Evidently, supporting an extremist judge who will help push Donald Trump's reckless agenda through the courts is more important than the women who have been allegedly assaulted by Kavanaugh.

[**Hugin's just another one of Trump's "good-old-boys" who is committed to advancing an extremist agenda, damn the consequences. If you stand with women and all New Jerseyans, chip in $3 or more today to help re-elect Democratic Senator Bob Menendez, a real leader.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cda/3af3c5d/3902eac7/4ec3248d/3865788092/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_sept_eoq?gpsid=5_73_3872&refcode=em18_180926_SEOQ2_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180926_SEOQ2_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+Hugins+just+another+one+of+Trumps+goodol") **[DONATE](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cda/3af3c5d/3902eac7/4ec3248c/3865788092/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_sept_eoq?gpsid=5_73_3872&refcode=em18_180926_SEOQ2_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180926_SEOQ2_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+DONATE")** Hugin fought against women and LGBTQ citizens at his fancy Princeton dinner club.

He continues to tout his support for a president who has bragged about sexually assaulting women.

**New Jersey deserves better than Bob Hugin, Brett Kavanaugh, and Donald Trump.**

[**But if we don 't hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal, Hugin may be able to buy this election and continue his radical anti-women agenda. We can't let that happen. Chip in $3 or more before time runs out.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cda/3af3c5d/3902eac7/4ec3248f/3865788092/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_sept_eoq?gpsid=5_73_3872&refcode=em18_180926_SEOQ2_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180926_SEOQ2_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+But+if+we+donrsquot+hit+our+endofquarter")

Thank you,

Erin

body:

name: Tom Wolf
subject: this weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for GovernorContributions or gifts to Tom Wolf for Governor are not tax deductible
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Hello,

It may not be flashy. It may not sound like the next big thing. But neighbors talking to neighbors is still the best way to win elections and make our state a better home for all of us.

That's why, this weekend, my team is launching a big Weekend of Action across Pennsylvania. And as a key member of our Wolfpack, I'm hoping you can make it, on Saturday or Sunday.

**Take part in this Weekend of Action -- find a volunteer event near you and sign up to knock on doors, call voters, and help us win:** **[Find an event this Saturday>>](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec646/73a2bc12/24d06dfb/1fcebbb1/1875507863/VEsH/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/padems/?date=2018-09-29T04%3A00%3A00.000Z&event_type=1")**

**[Find an event on Sunday>>](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec646/73a2bc12/24d06dfb/1fcebbb0/1875507863/VEsE/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/padems/?date=2018-09-30T04%3A00%3A00.000Z&event_type=1")** Canvassing is the most effective way to activate voters and get them out to vote. That's why our team is launching a canvass in West Philly on Saturday, and friends of mine across the state will be doing the same on both Saturday and Sunday.

You can also get involved by calling Democrats and making sure they're registered and ready to vote.

This is our last Weekend of Action before the final stretch of the election starts, so don't miss your chance to join us.

**Find a volunteer event near you this Weekend of Action, and sign up to join thousands of Democrats across Pennsylvania.** **[Find an event this Saturday>>](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec646/73a2bc12/24d06dfb/1fcebbb1/1875507863/VEsF/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/padems/?date=2018-09-29T04%3A00%3A00.000Z&event_type=1")**

**[Find an event on Sunday>>](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec646/73a2bc12/24d06dfb/1fcebbb0/1875507863/VEsC/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/padems/?date=2018-09-30T04%3A00%3A00.000Z&event_type=1")** Thanks for your help and your commitment to this team,

Tom

Paid for by Tom Wolf for GovernorContributions or gifts to Tom Wolf for Governor are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec646/73a2bc12/24d06dfb/1fcebbb7/1875507863/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.wolfforpa.com/changeaddress?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
We believe that emails are an important way for the campaign to stay in contact with supporters like you. This campaign appreciates any feedback you might have -- positive or negative. [Click here](mailto:info@wolfforpa.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact the campaign with any questions, concerns, or ideas. [Click here](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec646/73a2bc12/24d06dfb/1fcebbb6/1875507863/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") if you would like to unsubscribe from Tom Wolf for Governor email updates.
---

subject: Stop the Republican tax scam from becoming permanent!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
Republicans want to CUT Medicare and Social Security to pay for a permanent tax scam [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_180926_Tax_EM&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Peter, we can't let this happen:

**House Republicans are aiming to vote THIS WEEK to make their tax scam bill PERMANENT -- and you can expect them to cut Medicare and Social Security to pay for it.**

**[Stand with Linda and sign your name to protect Medicare and Social Security and against the unfair Republican tax policies becoming permanent. If enough of us speak out, we can send a clear message that we'll hold them accountable.](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/150366fe/4ac3d62d/6a39e048/1ce28bba/1619078191/VEsE/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/s/rtw_180926_tax?source=RTW_180926_Tax_EM")** | | ******[SIGN YOUR NAME](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/150366fe/4ac3d62d/6a39e048/1ce28bba/1619078191/VEsF/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/s/rtw_180926_tax?source=RTW_180926_Tax_EM")******
---
Republicans don't care that their tax scam is a giveaway to the ultra-wealthy balanced on the backs of middle-class families. Their vote this week just proves they are willing to double down on putting corporations and the top 1% first. And when the bill for their scheme eventually comes due, Medicare and Social Security could be the first on the chopping block.

Linda is determined to stop this from happening -- and she's going to make sure that voters remember on Election Day which party stands for the middle class, affordable healthcare, and secure retirement.

**Let 's raise our voices loudly on this one! Sign Linda's petition now: [http://ca.voteforlinda.com/stop-the-tax-scam](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/150366fe/4ac3d62d/6a39e048/1ce28bba/1619078191/VEsC/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/s/rtw_180926_tax?source=RTW_180926_Tax_EM")**

Thank you,

Team Sanchez
**Rep. Linda S anchez proudly serves the 38th District of California. She is the fifth-highest ranking member of Leadership as the Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus and is the highest-ranking Latina in Congress. As a mother, union member, and progressive, Linda will always fight for America's working families.** **[CONTRIBUTE](http://ca.voteforlinda. She is the fifth-highest ranking member of Leadership as the Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus and is the highest-ranking Latina in Congress. As a mother, union member, and progressive, Linda will always fight for America's working families.
